desc: External command that imports a Navisworks clash XML file into .mepbridge/qa using ReadWriteClashResultsToXml.MergeImportedXml.
summary: External command that imports a Navisworks clash XML file into .mepbridge/qa using ReadWriteClashResultsToXml.MergeImportedXml.
usecase: Coordinator merges a Navisworks clash report into the BUILD X clash navigator.
notfor: Silent headless import without user file selection in interactive Revit sessions.
precondition: Active document should be saved so QA paths resolve beside the RVT.
postcondition: New timestamped results_*.xml may be written, or JSON feedback is returned via CommandExecutor.SetResultObject.

preprompts: Opening file picker for Navisworks clash XML…
Merging Navisworks clash report into QA results…
thinkingsteps: Validating active document and import path…
Reading merged clash count from latest results…
successprompts: Import complete — merged {count} clash rows into {outputPath}.
